errors.visible_failure: ArchEAngel was counted as a separate primary AI instead of an escalation layer under ArchE.
errors.likely_cause: Loose classification between primary AI identities and helper/escalation lanes.
errors.repair: Classify ArchEAngel as escalation mode under ArchE. Classify WarLock as escalation coordinator under V-Lock AI.
errors.verification_check: Primary AI count must equal four: ArchE, AV.AI, V-Lock AI, The Janitor.
errors.do_not_repeat_rule: Never count escalation layers as separate primary AIs unless user explicitly reclassifies them.
errors.carryforward_rule: Separate primary AIs, escalation layers, and round-table lanes in every architecture document.
